experience_summary: process optimization within the automotive components industry. Proven ability to reduce production costs while maintaining strict quality standards.
full_text:
Vikram Singh
 Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India | +91 88990 01122 | vikram.singh.mech@yahoo.com | linkedin.com/in/vikramsingh-mech
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Mechanical Design Engineer with 5 years of experience in product design, CAD modeling, and manufacturing
process optimization within the automotive components industry. Proven ability to reduce production costs while
maintaining strict quality standards.
SKILLS
SolidWorks
AutoCAD
CATIA V5
ANSYS (FEA)
GD&T
DFMEA / PFMEA
Six Sigma (Green Belt)
Lean Manufacturing
CNC Machining
Tolerance Stack-up Analysis
Material Selection
Product Lifecycle Management (PLM)
Root Cause Analysis
MS Project
ISO 9001 Quality Standards
WORK EXPERIENCE
Senior Mechanical Design Engineer — Apex Auto Components Ltd
Coimbatore, India | Feb 2022 – Present
 Led design of a lightweight suspension bracket that reduced component weight by 15% without compromising
strength.
 Conducted FEA simulations in ANSYS to validate designs, reducing physical prototype iterations by 40%.
 Implemented Lean manufacturing changes on the assembly line that improved throughput by 20%.
 Coordinated with cross-functional teams to launch 4 new product lines within budget and schedule.
Design Engineer — Tristar Precision Engineering
Chennai, India | Jun 2019 – Jan 2022
 Created detailed 3D models and production drawings in SolidWorks for automotive sub-assemblies.
 Performed tolerance stack-up analysis to resolve recurring fitment issues, cutting rework by 25%.
 Supported DFMEA reviews that identified critical failure modes prior to production release.
EDUCATION
B.E. in Mechanical Engineering
PSG College of Technology, Coimbatore | 2015 – 2019
CERTIFICATIONS
 Six Sigma Green Belt Certification (2021)
 Certified SolidWorks Professional (CSWP), 2020
